{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011250A0B7182AE6F2F06F7780"}"},"total":274},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536224861764158232","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"找了好久的年代文 终于找到一本心仪的！看过太多 都是几章就看不下去了 这本确实是我最喜欢的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754668374,"group_id":"7520542074173672510","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+8IeDBlwgWzIJqwVuKPOJY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/53e88f59c9914abe8e7e86b4ac9548f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878241&x-signature=yKuXNWRNM9G5JFQxOzWvVn9ro4M%3D","user_id":"74190290709","user_name":"玖阴争精"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"74190290709","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7520542074173672510","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常】【多女主】【轻幽默】
上一辈子婚姻生活坎坷无比的陈建民，穿越到了八十年代后年轻护林员身上，面临的第一件大事就是要不要当个上门女婿……这一辈子不想再辛辛苦苦打拼的陈建民，把躺平当做人生第一要务，因此，眼睛都没眨一下就答应了介绍人去相亲。结果，一眼就相中了人家。
可是后来的事情太出乎意料了，相亲对象的”问题“很严重，那咋办？陈建民乐呵呵地表示：这只能凉拌！与此同时，隔壁的俏媳妇羞怯地伸出橄榄枝，卫生院的美女大夫借着驻村机会住进了他的东屋，还有……
陈建民凭借着前世积累的宝贵人生经验，把不要脸的精神发挥到极致，终于把日子过成了衣裳有人抢着洗、饭有人争着做、钱还有人替他挣的剧本，实现了躺平的伟大目标，甚至还在不经意中把他所驻村子带上来了富裕之路……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0ac45efdae229d26a33b7acb36c554d0","author":"单公子","author_id":"","book_id":"7520542074173672510","book_name":"东北往事之快乐生活攻略","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7520542162065310270","read_count":"31499","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1092710"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"492","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,重生,多女主,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b34c58fbc3b0c7a3b0cf51441749c318~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469970&x-signature=6a%2BszkUmOLOQ1yvc%2FjuGjx2bVxY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3764334393826925","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011250A0B7182AE6F2F06F7780"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","
